title: astragalus polyanthus
intro: Astragalus polyanthus, also known as milk vetch or yellow milk vetch, is a perennial herb in the legume family native to China and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Astragalus polyanthus are attributed to its ability to enhance the body's natural defense mechanisms, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce stress and fatigue, making it a popular herbal remedy for various conditions, including respiratory infections and autoimmune disorders. Astragalus polyanthus can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
